entities.name: Day 5: Lower Body Focus #2
entities.context: Fifth day of a training program focused on lower body strength

entities.name: Deadlifts
entities.context: Barbell or trap bar exercise, 3x8-10 reps, with single leg Romanian deadlift substitute

entities.name: Walking Lunges with Rotation
entities.context: Lunge variation using medicine ball or plate, 3x16 steps

entities.name: Kettlebell Swings
entities.context: Explosive hip hinge movement, 3x15-20 reps, with broad jumps as alternative

entities.name: Step Up to Reverse Lunge
entities.context: Compound lower body movement, 3x5 per leg

entities.name: Glute Bridges
entities.context: Hip extension exercise with hip thrust variation, 3x12 reps

entities.name: Single Leg Stability Ball Curls
entities.context: Hamstring isolation with stability ball, 3x8 per leg

entities.name: TRX Single Leg Squat to Row
entities.context: TRX suspension trainer used for combined squat and row, 3x8 per leg

entities.name: Rotational Ball Throws
entities.context: Anti-rotation and power exercise against wall, 3x8 per side

entities.name: Strength Circuit
entities.context: Circuit-style training format, 1-3 rounds of all exercises

entities.name: Warm-up + Activation
entities.context: 10-15 minute preparatory phase including marching and activation drills

entities.name: TRX
entities.context: Suspension training system used for single leg squat to row exercise

entities.name: Stability Ball
entities.context: Exercise ball used for single leg hamstring curls

entities.name: Medicine Ball
entities.context: Weighted ball used for walking lunges with rotation and rotational throws

Preparatory phase preceding the strength work
